title: Zhan Xingye
content:
Zhan Xingye
 is the 
Zhan Family
's founder and creator of their Battle Scrolls.

Contents

1

Background

2

History

2.1

Book Nine

2.2

Book Ten

3

Quotes

Background
[
]

He found himself trapped in a 
Seven-Colored Realm
 by the 
Sovereign
, who was afraid of his ancestor 
Old Ghost Zhan
 and wanted to assess whether or not he was dead.

He remained defiant to the end and this allowed him to form a powerful Battle Will.

History
[
]

Book Nine
[
]

Wang Lin
 find his corpse inside a Seven Coloured Realm and inherited his Battle Will which later went to become one of his essences.

Book Ten
[
]

Wang Lin informs his descendant 
Zhan Li Yunzi
 of his fate, allowing him to bury his grudge with him and 
Master Lu Fu
.

Quotes
[
]

"Cultivators like us never shrink from a fight!" - about his Battle Will.

Inherited and rephrased by Wang Lin.
